enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable the scarcity timer on the checkout page

en.title: English
en.default: We are keeping this offer for a limited time.

fr.title: French
fr.default: Nous gardons cette offre pour une durée limitée.

color.title: Color
color.description: The color of the text of the scarcity timer above the primary color with a low opacity

seconds.title: Seconds
seconds.description: The number of seconds the scarcity timer will run for

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable the scarcity timer on the post-purchase offer page

en.title: English
en.default: We are keeping this offer for a limited time.

fr.title: French
fr.default: Nous gardons cette offre pour une durée limitée.

color.title: Color
color.description: The color of the text of the scarcity timer above the primary color with a low opacity

seconds.title: Seconds
seconds.description: The number of seconds the scarcity timer will run for

textColor.title: Text Color
textColor.description: Main text color used throughout the checkout

textSecondaryColor.title: Secondary Text Color
textSecondaryColor.description: Secondary text color for less prominent text

backgroundColor.title: Background Color
backgroundColor.description: Main background color for the checkout page

borderColor.title: Border Color
borderColor.description: Default border color used throughout the checkout

showLogo.title: Show Logo
showLogo.description: Toggle to display a logo image instead of the company name in the header

goToShopTextColor.title: Go to Shop Text Color
goToShopTextColor.description: Color of the 'Go to Shop' button text

borderColor.title: Border Color
borderColor.description: Color of the header bottom border

companyName.title: Company Name
companyName.description: The name of the company will be displayed in the header when the logo is not displayed

cardNetworks.title: Card Networks
cardNetworks.description: List of card networks that are accepted for payment. Leave empty to allow all card networks.

stickyOrderSummary.title: Sticky Order Summary
stickyOrderSummary.description: If enabled, the order summary will be sticky and will follow the user as they scroll down the page on desktop view.

showMarketingCheckbox.title: Show Marketing Checkbox
showMarketingCheckbox.description: Show the 'Email me with news and offers' checkbox

mergeContactAndDelivery.title: Merge Contact & Delivery Sections
mergeContactAndDelivery.description: Hides the Contact section header and moves email into the Delivery section after the phone field

showCartCustomAttributes.title: Show Cart Custom Attributes
showCartCustomAttributes.description: Display custom cart attributes (e.g., personalization fields like username) in the order summary. These are custom fields added to cart items from Shopify or other platforms.

showLineItemProperties.title: Show Line Item Properties
showLineItemProperties.description: Display custom properties on individual line items (e.g., personalization fields) in the order summary.

digitalProduct.title: Digital Product Mode
digitalProduct.description: Enable this for digital products that don't require shipping. Hides shipping address fields but keeps billing address visible.

hideStateSelector.title: Hide State Selector
hideStateSelector.description: Hide the state/province selector in the shipping address form.

forcedCountry.title: Forced Country
forcedCountry.description: Force a default country for the checkout address. Takes priority over geolocation but not over an existing customer session country. Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. US, FR, GB).

backgroundColor.title: Background Color
backgroundColor.description: Background color for the order summary section. Use CSS color values (hex, rgb, hsl, etc.)

opacity.title: Background Opacity
opacity.description: Opacity percentage for the order summary background (0-100)

cardBackgroundColor.title: Card Background Color
cardBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the offer card on the offer page. Use CSS color values (hex, rgb, hsl, etc.)

cardOpacity.title: Card Background Opacity
cardOpacity.description: Opacity percentage for the offer card background (0-100)

displayShippingRate.title: Display Shipping Rate
displayShippingRate.description: If enabled, the shipping rate selection will be displayed. If disabled, shipping rate selection will be hidden.

requireShippingRate.title: Require Shipping Rate
requireShippingRate.description: If enabled, customers must select a shipping rate before completing the order. If disabled, orders can be completed without selecting a shipping rate.

availableShippingCountries.title: Available Shipping Countries
availableShippingCountries.description: List of country codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) that are available for shipping. Leave empty to allow all countries.

en.title: English
en.default: My billing address is different from my shipping address

fr.title: French
fr.default: Mon adresse de facturation est différente de mon adresse de livraison

useIconUrl.description: If enabled, the icon will be replaced by an image. If disabled, the icon will be used.

en.title: English
en.default: Your order has been received and is awaiting Zelle payment.

fr.title: French
fr.default: Votre commande a été reçue et est en attente de paiement Zelle.

en.title: English
en.default: Please use only your Order Number #{orderNumber} as the payment memo/reference when sending your Zelle payment. This ensures your payment is matched to your order quickly.

fr.title: French
fr.default: Veuillez utiliser uniquement votre numéro de commande #{orderNumber} comme mémo/référence de paiement lors de l'envoi de votre paiement Zelle. Cela garantit que votre paiement est associé rapidement à votre commande.

title.en: Open your Zelle app or banking app
title.fr: Ouvrez votre application Zelle ou bancaire

description.en: Log in to your bank's mobile app or the Zelle app.
description.fr: Connectez-vous à l'application mobile de votre banque ou à l'application Zelle.

description.en: Send the exact amount shown in your order summary to the Zelle account provided in your confirmation email.
description.fr: Envoyez le montant exact indiqué dans le résumé de votre commande au compte Zelle fourni dans votre e-mail de confirmation.

title.en: Use your Order Number as memo
title.fr: Utilisez votre numéro de commande comme mémo

description.en: Enter #{orderNumber} as the memo or reference for your payment.
description.fr: Entrez #{orderNumber} comme mémo ou référence pour votre paiement.

description.en: Once your payment is verified, you will receive a confirmation email and your order will be processed.
description.fr: Une fois votre paiement vérifié, vous recevrez un e-mail de confirmation et votre commande sera traitée.

en.title: English
en.default: Your bank may ask security questions when sending to a new business account. This is a standard security measure to protect you from fraud. Please answer the verification questions and proceed with the payment.

fr.title: French
fr.default: Votre banque peut poser des questions de sécurité lors d'un envoi vers un nouveau compte professionnel. Il s'agit d'une mesure de sécurité standard pour vous protéger contre la fraude. Veuillez répondre aux questions de vérification et procéder au paiement.

en.title: English
en.default: A confirmation email with your order details and Zelle payment instructions has been sent to {email}.

fr.title: French
fr.default: Un e-mail de confirmation avec les détails de votre commande et les instructions de paiement Zelle a été envoyé à {email}.
